top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) 
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) 
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND b.bond_type = 'triple'
) 
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
)
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%';
